title: Senior Cage Cashier
description:
JOB SCOPE
Able to perform the functions of a Cage Cashier, duties and responsibilities include but are not limited to;

  • Train and competent in Main Bank Operations and/or VIP Cage Operations.
  • Verify and acknowledge cashier transactions.

Main Bank responsibilities:

  • Ensure that the casino has adequate cash reserves and that all excess cash coin, foreign currency and other negotiable instruments are banked on a timely basis
  • Preparation of the Kiosk Cassettes, maintaining and overseeing Kiosk operation
  • Take over the inventory of the Main Bank at the commencement of the shift
  • Receive credits of cash and other cash equivalents from the Remote Cages/Remote Main banks
  • Receive turn-ins from Cage Front Window cashiers, Team Member Bank and VIP windows
  • Receive cash and tokens from the Count rooms and balance all Main Bank inventory items to the computer system at the completion of the shift
  • Prepare excess cash/coin, foreign currency and other negotiable instruments for banking each day
  • Provide friendly, efficient and courteous service to all internal and external customers.

VIP Cage Operation responsibilities:

  • Proficient in all Cage transactions related to VIP Gaming, including Rolling Chip Exchanges, Patron Account Transactions, Marker transactions, Foreign Exchange, Buy-ins and settlements, Pit Clerk functions

JOB REQUIREMENTS

Education & Certification

  • Secondary education/Diploma preferred

Experience

  • Minimum of one year of cashier experience in a cash handling environment

Other Prerequisites

  • Experience in handling cash and foreign exchange currencies preferred
  • Able to operate electronic cashier equipment (e.g. note counters, counterfeit detectors)
  • Able to communicate effectively with both English and Mandarin-speaking guests
  • Possess a flair for numericals and excellent service and communication skills
  • Willing to work various shifts, including mornings, afternoons, and overnight, as well as on public holidays

Marina Bay Sands is committed to building a diverse, equitable and inclusive workforce, providing equal opportunities as we grow our talent base to match our growth ambitions in Singapore. Our employees are committed to adhere to and abide by all rules, regulations, policies and procedures, including the rules of conduct and business ethics of the Company.

postedCompany.description:
Since its opening in 2010, Marina Bay Sands has stood as an architectural marvel and the crown jewel in Singapore’s skyline. Home to the world’s most spectacular rooftop infinity pool and approximately 1,850 rooms and suites, the integrated resort offers exceptional dining, shopping, meeting and entertainment choices, complete with a year-round calendar of signature events.

Marina Bay Sands is dedicated to being a good corporate citizen to serve its people, communities and environment. It drives social impact through its community engagement programme, Sands Cares, and leads environmental stewardship through its global sustainability programme, Sands ECO360.
